channel.title: SparkFit Blog
channel.description: Fitness, workouts and simple nutrition from SparkFit.

item.title: 15-Minute Full-Body Workouts for Busy Adults: No Equipment Needed
item.description: Pressed for time? Discover effective 15-minute full-body workouts you can do anywhere, no equipment required. Build strength, boost energy and stay consistent even on your busiest days.
